subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! The Day is God's Day, and the Cause is His Cause, and the Book is His Book, and His Manifestation hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمود یوم یوم الله است و امر امر او و کتاب کتاب او و ظهور ظهور او ظاهر شده
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
